metadata.sysdescription: is a Kralien bio-industrial system that treats medicine as both healing and leverage: they excel at organics, nano-assisted delivery systems, and rapid-response clinics, but their research culture is comfortable walking right up to ethical lines. Trade is lucrative and unsettling—Setmari can save worlds, and they know it. For TSN, Setmari is a potential ally and a potential nightmare, depending on who holds the contracts.
